name: Content Campaign
description: Generates a full content marketing campaign: 5 blog posts, social media threads, and a distribution plan with scheduling. Follows a content waterfall strategy from long-form to social.

productDescription.description: Description of the product, service, or topic to create content for (2-5 sentences)

targetAudience.description: Who the content is for (e.g., 'Developer advocates at Series A-C startups')

brandVoice.description: Tone and style for all content

fields.name: summary
fields.description: Campaign strategy overview and key themes

fields.name: blogPosts
fields.description: Array of 5 blog posts with title, content, targetKeywords, and imagePrompt

fields.name: socialThreads
fields.description: Array of social media threads adapted per platform from blog content

fields.name: distributionPlan
fields.description: Publishing schedule with dates, platforms, and content mapping

invariants.invariant: PHASE 1: STRATEGY. Before writing ANY content, create an artifact 'campaign-strategy.md' documenting: (1) audience research findings from web search, (2) competitor content audit (what top 3 competitors publish), (3) content pillars chosen and why, (4) keyword opportunities identified. This strategy must inform all subsequent content.
invariants.measurement: Verify 'campaign-strategy.md' artifact exists before any blog posts are written. Must contain audience insights, competitor analysis, and keyword research.

do: Research what {{targetAudience}} reads, shares, and engages with
Audit top 3 competitor blogs for content gaps
Identify 5-10 keywords with search volume data
dont: Start writing blog posts without researching the audience

invariants.invariant: Follow a content waterfall: blog posts are created FIRST, then social threads are derived FROM the blog content (not independently). Each social thread must reference which blog post it promotes and adapt the key message for the specific platform.
invariants.measurement: Each socialThread must have a 'sourceBlogIndex' field. Social content must demonstrably derive from blog content, not be independently generated.

do: Blog post: 'Why AI Agents Need Standards' → Twitter thread: '10 reasons AI agents need standards (thread from our latest post)'
LinkedIn adaptation: professional angle from the same blog
dont: Write social threads on topics not covered in blog posts
Generate blog and social content independently

invariants.invariant: Produce exactly 5 blog posts. Each MUST have: title, content (minimum 100 words), targetKeywords (array of 2-3 SEO keywords), imagePrompt (descriptive prompt for AI image generation), and estimatedReadTime. Content must match the {{brandVoice}} tone.
invariants.measurement: Count result.blogPosts. Must be exactly 5. Each must have all 5 fields. Word count each content field — must be >= 100.

do: { title: 'The Future of Agent-to-Agent Commerce', content: '... (500 words) ...', targetKeywords: ['agent commerce', 'AI marketplace', 'x402'], imagePrompt: 'Futuristic marketplace with digital agents exchanging services, neon colors, isometric', estimatedReadTime: '3 min' }

invariants.invariant: Social threads must use platform-native formatting: Twitter/X (thread of 5-10 tweets, 280 char max each, use emojis sparingly), LinkedIn (single long-form post, professional tone, no hashtag spam), Reddit (discussion-starting post, no self-promotion feel), dev.to (technical deep-dive format). Only generate for channels in {{distributionChannels}}.
invariants.measurement: For each social thread, verify format matches the platform conventions. Twitter tweets must be <= 280 chars. LinkedIn must be single-post format.

do: Twitter: Break into numbered tweets, use line breaks, end with CTA
LinkedIn: Open with a hook question, use bullet points, include 3-5 relevant hashtags
dont: Use identical formatting across all platforms
Generate content for platforms not in distributionChannels

invariants.invariant: The distributionPlan must include: a 2-week publishing schedule with specific dates starting from the current date, which content publishes on each platform on each day, optimal posting times per platform, and repurposing strategy (how content gets recycled after initial publish).
invariants.measurement: Verify distributionPlan has schedule (array of dated entries), postingTimes (per platform), and repurposingStrategy fields.

do: Week 1 Mon: Blog #1 publishes. Tue: Twitter thread from Blog #1. Wed: LinkedIn post from Blog #1. Thu: Blog #2 publishes...
Repurposing: 'Week 3: Re-share top performer with updated hook'
dont: Publish all 5 blogs on the same day
Omit specific dates from the schedule

invariants.invariant: Each blog post must include an imagePrompt field: a detailed, descriptive prompt suitable for AI image generation (DALL-E, Midjourney style). The prompt should describe the visual concept, style, color palette, and composition. Must be at least 20 words.
invariants.measurement: For each blog post, verify imagePrompt exists and is >= 20 words. Must describe visual style, not just the topic.

do: 'A minimalist illustration of interconnected nodes forming a network, soft gradient from purple to blue, clean lines, white background, tech startup aesthetic'
